name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly refines the methodology for data processing, sensitivity quantification, and Fisher forecasting compared to the original plan. Specifically, the new plan introduces differential distribution analysis ($dN/d\tau$), Kullback-Leibler divergence, and a more rigorous Fisher matrix construction with redshift-dependent source density, which were not present in the original plan. Since the core analytical approach has been updated, it is safer to restart the execution to ensure all new metrics and methodologies are correctly implemented.
